OpenAI subscription MCP production smoke trigger.

Requested: 2026-07-24
Trigger nonce: 2026-07-24-openai-mcp-production-smoke-7
Reason: verify the Chat 9 subscription MCP integration with a bounded 120-second MCP RPC timeout.
Lifecycle: create one short-lived scoped credential, verify read-only access, then revoke it in the same workflow run.
